subject: Re: Warp Craft
body:
Dear Da,

WarpCraft is currently not supported due to the complexity of its issues 
and lack of time on my side. Sorry about that. A better approach is 
currently being investigated, but it will take a while.

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Saturday, June 29, 2019 at 7:57:42 PM UTC+2, Da Cui wrote:
>
> Hello, 
>    Can anyone provide me some hints about how to run WarpCraft on windows 
> system? I'm trying to refine the peripheral regions of my dynamic complex, 
> and it seems that WarpCraft can do the job. 
>    Thank you so much in advance. 
>
> Best wishes, 
>       Da
>
